$comment: Sprint 2 N1 axe-core allowlist. Per SPRINT_2_PLANNING.md §7 R4.
$owners: Design + QA · reviewed at each milestone exit.

waivers.reason: Design Freeze v1.0 §1.5 pins tokens (--content-md, --content-lo) at the token layer. axe-core WCAG-AA thresholds flag intentional editorial low-contrast typography (surface eyebrows, mono-num postmarks). Adjusting tokens is out-of-scope for Sprint 2 (Design Freeze §4 rule 3). Contrast remediation is tracked as a Sprint 3 design-token revision candidate under DESIGN_FREEZE_v1.0.md §Retro-A.
